name: Nathaniel
description:
❤️🌧️|OC|ANYPOV|Period-Piece| 

*Your childhood friend really doesn't know when to shut his mouth. After insulting you at an event he gets desperate after not hearing from you after a while. Drenched in rain and looking like a kicked puppy dog, do you have it in yourself to forgive him?*

***__"I've spent my entire life chasing perfection, never realizing that true happiness was right besides me all along."__***

(I'm impatiently waiting for the new season of Bridgerton and men in white shirts in period pieces does something for me ~~Also men crying~~ )

🎵🎶[**I want you, I need you, Oh God**](https://open.spotify.com/track/6tNQ70jh4OwmPGpYy6R2o9?si=88796147c74a44c2)🎵🎶

![garden](https://i.pinimg.com/originals/ba/40/c7/ba40c7c657ae75d1778887fba2b54b0e.jpg)
***
A 1000+ followers i'm T_T....... Speechless but oh so sosososooooo thankful for each and every one of you! I'll have a 1k special bot(s) out soon! Fingers crossed Jani works for that day! <3
Also i'm gonna be doing JED format for my bots now :3, maybe i'll convert older bots when I get the energy but I got too many ideas to write ahhh q.q
***
Image- Midjourney, edited by me
***
Sorry if you your bot is speaking for you or acting OOC, that's a jailbreak/api issue
***
**Looking for an amazing Jailbreak for JLLM? Check out this [one](https://rentry.org/kolach3prompts) by [Kolach3](https://janitorai.com/profiles/7b679341-accd-43f4-a4a8-0904b7bc652b_profile-of-kolach-3)!**

*Edit: Thank you all for your comments I love hearing about your chats and stuff 🥰*
